metadata.title: Tikvatenu - Youth for the Future of Israel
metadata.description: A Zionist youth initiative building bridges in Israeli society

hero.subtitle: Youth for the Future of Israel
hero.description: We believe in the power of young Israelis from diverse backgrounds to build bridges and promote mutual understanding in Israeli society. Our events provide a platform for open dialogue, shared learning, and a deep connection to our Jewish and Israeli identity.
hero.nothingUpcoming: No upcoming events at the moment

about.title: About Tikvatenu
about.heroSubtitle: Young people who believe things can be different

mission.title: Our Vision
mission.description: We believe the path to a better society runs through direct dialogue, face-to-face encounters, and mutual understanding between different groups in Israeli society.

problem.title: The Challenge
problem.description: Israeli society suffers from growing polarization. Different groups live side by side yet rarely meet. Lack of familiarity breeds suspicion, alienation, and fear. Shallow public discourse replaces genuine dialogue.

solution.title: Our Way
solution.description: Tikvatenu organizes face-to-face encounters between young people from diverse backgrounds. We don't argue — we talk. We don't judge — we listen. We create safe spaces for honest dialogue, where people discover how much they share with those who seemed so different.

dialogue.title: Direct Dialogue
dialogue.description: We believe in the power of face-to-face conversation. Not through screens, not through slogans — but through genuine human connection.

bridge.title: Building Bridges
bridge.description: We create connections between groups that rarely meet. Secular and religious, left and right, center and periphery.

hope.title: Active Hope
hope.description: Hope is not just a feeling — it's an action. Every encounter, every conversation, every hand extended is a step toward a shared future.

youth.title: Youth Empowerment
youth.description: Young people will shape the future. We give them the tools, the platform, and the confidence to lead change.

activities.title: From Our Activities
activities.description: Events, encounters, and workshops connecting young people from across Israeli society.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: A diverse group of young people united by shared values.

cta.title: Want to Be Part of It?
cta.description: Join the movement of young people building a different future for Israeli society.

footer.tagline: Tikvatenu - Youth for the Future of Israel
footer.about: At Tikvatenu, we believe in the power of young Israelis from diverse backgrounds to build bridges and promote mutual understanding in Israeli society. We hold events and invite every young person to join us.
